source_note: Control reference numbers (e.g. A.5.15) and their standard short titles are factual identifiers from ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A. ISO/IEC 27001:2022 is a copyrighted standard; the descriptions below are original condensed summaries written for this demo and are NOT the official ISO control text. For authoritative wording, consult the licensed standard.

controls.title: Policies for information security
controls.description: Define, approve, publish, and periodically review a set of information security policies and communicate them to relevant personnel.

controls.title: Threat intelligence
controls.description: Collect and analyze information about information security threats so that appropriate mitigating actions can be taken.

controls.title: Inventory of information and other associated assets
controls.description: Develop and maintain an inventory of information and associated assets, including owners, to support their protection.

controls.title: Access control
controls.description: Establish and implement rules to control physical and logical access to information and associated assets based on business and security requirements.

controls.title: Identity management
controls.description: Manage the full lifecycle of identities assigned to people and systems so that access can be attributed and controlled.

controls.title: Authentication information
controls.description: Control the allocation and management of authentication information such as passwords and keys, including secure handling and storage.

controls.title: Access rights
controls.description: Provision, review, modify, and remove access rights to information and associated assets in line with the access control policy.

controls.title: Information security for use of cloud services
controls.description: Establish processes for acquisition, use, management, and exit from cloud services consistent with security requirements.

controls.title: Information security incident management planning and preparation
controls.description: Plan and prepare for managing incidents by defining processes, roles, and responsibilities for incident handling.

controls.title: Response to information security incidents
controls.description: Respond to information security incidents in accordance with documented procedures.

controls.title: ICT readiness for business continuity
controls.description: Plan, implement, and test ICT readiness so that availability of information and systems can be maintained during disruption.

controls.title: Information security awareness, education and training
controls.description: Provide personnel with appropriate security awareness, education, and training, and regular updates relevant to their role.

controls.title: Physical security monitoring
controls.description: Continuously monitor premises for unauthorized physical access.

controls.title: Secure authentication
controls.description: Implement secure authentication technologies and procedures based on access restrictions and the access control policy, including stronger authentication where warranted.

controls.title: Protection against malware
controls.description: Protect against malware through technical controls and appropriate user awareness.

controls.title: Management of technical vulnerabilities
controls.description: Obtain information about technical vulnerabilities, evaluate exposure, and take appropriate measures such as patching to address risk.

controls.title: Information backup
controls.description: Maintain and test backup copies of information, software, and systems in line with an agreed backup policy.

controls.title: Logging
controls.description: Produce, store, protect, and analyze logs that record activities, exceptions, faults, and other relevant events.

controls.title: Monitoring activities
controls.description: Monitor networks, systems, and applications for anomalous behavior and evaluate potential security incidents.

controls.title: Networks security
controls.description: Secure, manage, and control networks and network devices to protect information in systems and applications.

controls.title: Use of cryptography
controls.description: Define and implement rules for the effective use of cryptography, including key management, to protect information.
